nasb.text: The one who burns it shall also wash his clothes in water and bathe his body in water, and shall be unclean until evening.

esv.text: The one who burns the heifer shall wash his clothes in water and bathe his body in water and shall be unclean until evening.

cnv.text: 那燒牛的人也要用水洗自己的衣服，並用水洗身，也必不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 负责烧牛的人也要洗衣、沐浴，并且要等到傍晚才能洁净。
